mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.name, r.cas_number, r.specification, r.purity, r.category_id, r.unit, r.storage_condition, r.safety_stock_threshold, r.warning_advance_days, r.status, r.create_time, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(current_quantity), 0) FROM reagent_batch WHERE reagent_id = r.id AND status IN (0, 1)) AS total_stock FROM reagent r ORDER BY total_stock ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT r.id, r.name, r.cas_number, r.specification, r.purity, r.category_id, r.unit, r.storage_condition, r.safety_stock_threshold, r.warning_advance_days, r.status, r.create_time, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(current_quantity), 0) FROM reagent_batch WHERE reagent_id = r.id AND status IN (0, 1)) AS total_stock FROM reagent r ORDER BY total_stock DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT reagent_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity FROM warehouse_receipt WHERE receipt_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY reagent_id ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT reagent_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity FROM delivery_order WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND status = 1 GROUP BY reagent_id ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT 10
